page: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server powered by Intel Xeon 8559C processors. It features 96 vCPUs across 48 physical cores with hyper-threading, operating at a clock speed of 3.6 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, supported by a 320 MB L3 cache. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 6 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its local storage capacity, offering 60,000 GB of NVMe SSD storage. This high-capacity local storage is bundled directly with the bare-metal hardware. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer rates for large-scale distributed systems.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance across several key metrics. The server achieves top-tier results in Passmark database operations, Redis SET operations reaching 117.71 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput at 133.13 GB/sec. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth are also highly rated, placing in the top 25%. Additionally, the Intel Xeon processor's Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512 instruction sets contribute to top-tier performance in software compilation and medium-model LLM prompt processing.

Given its local storage density and DDR5 memory, the i7ie.metal-24xl offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high-throughput local data access without the latency of network-attached storage. It is suited for large-scale relational and non-relational databases, high-performance caching layers, data warehousing, and intensive ETL processing.
description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server designed for data-intensive workloads. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8559C processor with 96 vCPUs, 48 physical cores, and a 3.6 GHz clock speed on the x86_64 architecture. The server features 768.0 GB of DDR5 memory and a massive 60,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. With a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps, it delivers high data throughput. Benchmark results show top-tier performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving. The inclusion of Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets enhances its capabilities for complex mathematical and cryptographic tasks. This server is suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and high-throughput caching applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server featuring 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 768 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 60 TB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a bare-metal server with 96 Intel vCPUs, 768 GB DDR5 RAM, and 60 TB NVMe SSD storage for intensive database workloads.
tagline: A bare-metal server combining ninety-six Intel vCPUs with sixty terabytes of local NVMe storage for high-throughput database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8559C processor with 96 vCPUs and 3.6 GHz clock speed
768 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory running at 6 GHz
60,000 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier performance in database operations and Redis caching
Optimized for large-scale databases, ETL, and data warehousing
